crisis_escalation.text: I am concerned about what you have shared. I am connecting you with your care team right now.

pain_escalation.text: I am concerned about your pain level. I am connecting you with your care team immediately.

medication_change_blocked.text: I cannot advise on changing your medication. Please contact your prescriber directly.

allergy_in_input.text: I noticed something related to a documented allergy. I am flagging this for your care team.

topic_control_input.text: That question is something your care team needs to assess directly. Can I help you with something else about your current record?

content_safety_general.text: I cannot share that safely. I am connecting you with your care team now.

content_safety_self_harm.text: I am concerned by what was generated. I am connecting you with your care team right now.

content_safety_crisis_language.text: I am concerned by this response and I am escalating it to your care team now.

content_safety_graphic_content.text: I cannot share that response safely. I am escalating this conversation to your care team.

content_safety_phi_leakage.text: I cannot safely share that response. I am escalating this to your care team.

content_safety_allergy_conflict.text: I cannot share advice that may conflict with your recorded allergies. I am notifying your care team.

topic_control_general.text: For that topic, please speak directly with your care team.

topic_control_diagnosis.text: I cannot diagnose new conditions. Please speak directly with your clinician.

topic_control_prescribing.text: I cannot make prescribing recommendations. Please contact your prescriber.

topic_control_dosage_change.text: I cannot recommend changing your dose. Please contact your prescriber directly.

topic_control_emergency_assessment.text: I cannot assess emergencies here. Please seek urgent care or contact your care team immediately.

topic_control_mental_health_therapy.text: That request needs direct support from a qualified clinician. Please contact your care team.

nemoguard_output_unreachable.text: I cannot safely deliver a response right now. I am connecting you with your care team.

nemoguard_input_blocked.text: I am not able to process that request safely. Please contact your care team.

general_escalation.text: I am connecting you with your care team. Please hold.
